title: SWISS
body:
**SWISS - A New Storage Mod**

SWISS is a powerful new storage mod designed to make managing your items easier and more efficient. It includes several components that work together to streamline your inventory management:

**Item Panel**  
View all items across your connected inventories in one convenient interface.

**Item Interface**  
Place this on any inventory block (like a chest or machine) to link it with your Item Panel and view its contents remotely.

**Export Interface**  
Automatically extract items from your connected inventories and send them to the inventory the interface is attached to.

Need help or want to share feedback?

Join Mangos Discord: [https://discord.mangorage.org/](https://discord.mangorage.org/)

Join benbenlaw Discord: [Discord](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://discord.com/invite/benbenlaw) 

Thanks for using SWISS!
